guestPrompt.title: Mine as a Guest?
guestPrompt.desc: You can mine $VOICICA as a guest, but only logged-in users can convert to USDT and withdraw. Guest earnings can only be used within the app.
guestPrompt.login: Log In to Unlock Full Access
